title: Microsoft Design System Fluent 2
content: Fluent 2 from Directories: Components: Microsoft Design System created for designing internal products. Fluent 2 is a wide library of guidelines, examples, and recommendations based on deep expertise in product design helps designers and developers collaborate more effectively, and it functions seamlessly across various Apps and devices. Microsoft Design System includes design principles and guidelines and components for Web React, iOS, Windows, and Android. UI kits encompass design assets perfectly aligned with the code libraries, ensuring a smooth transition from design to development consistently. Accessibility Color System Component overview Elevation Figma Repository Icons Layout Motion Responsive Spacing States Storybook Styles Theming Tokens Typography Voice and Tone Accordion Action bar Avatar Badges Button Cards Checkbox Combobox Dialog Divider Dropdown Icon Label Link Menus Popover Progress bar Progress indicator Radio button Select Slider Switch Tabs Text area Text field Tooltip
